name: ui-regression-pinner generated tests pin click-state navigation and rendered output assertions per the WCAG accessible-name standard
command: mkdir -p repo/src/components tests/e2e && (cd repo && git init -q && printf 'export const Button=({onClick})=><button onClick={onClick}>Submit</button>\n' > src/components/Button.tsx) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner.sh" --root repo --feature-id feat-x --tests-out tests/e2e --diff-stub touched=src/components/Button.tsx --emit assertions 2>out.txt && grep -q 'assertion=accessible-name' out.txt && grep -q 'assertion=click-state' out.txt && grep -q 'assertion=rendered-output' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
